name: Kadaj | Period Comfort 🩸
description:
'Your period? Oh this'll be fun...'

I got my period yesterday and wanted some comfort, then I was like 'Cloud would be cool, oh and Sephiroth, and the remnants too!' It didn't help that I just rewatched advent children last night too

Requested? Yes/No

Tw: the JLLM usual

Due to theft, I'll no longer do proxies.

If any of my bots are on other websites they're stolen and I haven't consented to anything

-----------------------------------------------------

Info About the Bots

The bot keeps talking for me, repeating itself, etc.

AI problem: Sometimes the bot may dominate the conversation or loop responses. This is a known limitation and can’t always be fully prevented, though I do my best to manage it. To help reduce this, try to avoid very short or minimal replies, as they can cause the bot to fill in the gaps on its own.

The bot keeps misgendering me or using the wrong names.

AI problem: You can use chat memory or reminders to help the bot keep your pronouns and name consistent. I generally write my bots to be gender-neutral, but mistakes happen. If you spot a gendered term in an introduction, just let me know and I’ll fix it—no need for harsh comments.

The bot is acting random, overly sexual, aggressive, etc.

AI problem: I’m not instructing the bot to behave this way; like when it speaks for you, the AI can sometimes generate unexpected responses. This is especially common with large language models. Please check the trigger warnings and tags—if something is marked “Dead Dove” or includes warnings for aggression, these behaviors may appear.
